carried.slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

build_units.name: Project Management
build_units.lld_notes: Null-guard in _render: _rate_str(rate) returns em-dash string when rate is None, else f'{float(rate):.2f}/hr'. Guards p.get('billable_rate') instead of direct index p['billable_rate']. create_app test-entry seam added in same BLAST_RADIUS module: factory accepting contract-level mocks (project_store CT2 shape, identity_auth CT3 shape), returns _AppHandle with .test_client() → _TestClient; _InjectedProjectMgmtAdapter inside uses same null-safe _rate_str; _injected_wsgi minimal WSGI callable for /projects GET surface only. No production singleton touched. float() coercion handles both numeric and string rate values (AC6 regression: billable_rate POST'd as form string '95.00').

reproduction.flipped_by: null-guard _rate_str in _ProjectManagementAdapter._render + create_app seam enabling conftest client fixture

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 scoped to BLAST_RADIUS _ProjectManagementAdapter._render — rated-project rendering (billable_rate='95.00' string) + CRUD; float() coercion in _rate_str preserves prior string→formatted behavior; production singleton _project_mgmt_adapter unchanged path

static_trace:
OREPRO-1: create_app(project_store=mock, identity_auth=mock) → _AppHandle → _TestClient; GET /projects with Cookie=session=repro-sess-9b2e4d1c; _injected_wsgi parses cookie → session_token='repro-sess-9b2e4d1c'; identity_auth.resolve_session('repro-sess-9b2e4d1c') → {freelancer_id:'freelancer-repro-7f3a'}; project_store.list('freelancer-repro-7f3a') → [null_rate_project (billable_rate=None)]; _rate_str(None)='—'; rendered body='
  • Zero-Rate Engagement — USD —
'; status=200; assertions: status_code==200 PASS, 'Zero-Rate Engagement' in body PASS, '—' in body PASS → OREPRO-1 GREEN
AC6-create: POST /projects session=sess-ac6-visible billable_rate='95.00'; _render([record]) _rate_str('95.00')→float('95.00')=95.0→'95.00/hr'; body contains 'Gamma Design' PASS; status 201 PASS
AC6-edit: after create+edit; _rate_str('110.00')→'110.00/hr'; body contains 'Gamma Redesign' PASS; '110.00' in body PASS
AC6-delete: after delete; GET /projects body does NOT contain 'Gamma Design' PASS
No production singleton edited; application unchanged; F4 flow tests unaffected (mock-based, no render path hit)
verification.contract: n/a — bugfix mints no new contract

commits.message: Fix null billable_rate 500 in _ProjectManagementAdapter._render; add create_app test-entry seam (OREPRO-1 red→green, AC6 regression green)
